## [00:00 - 01:32]

Welcome, my name is Tanner Smith and we're going to be talking about meta ads for beginners. The goal of this training today is to get you to launch your first meta ad campaign to generate leads and generate sales as fast as possible. Now before we get started, there's a couple things I need to make sure you understand. This is not going to help you become an expert. I'm not going to know everything there is to know about meta ads from this training. The goal is to take action. I want every single person that comes through here to have total confidence and clarity to know that I'm going to give you step by step by step the exact process so you can go from zero to launching your own meta ads and generating leads and sales. Now before we get started, there's a couple things that you're going to need. Number one, you're going to need a personal Facebook account. If you don't know what a Facebook account is yet or you don't have one set up, pause the video, go and do a Google search and set one up. It will take you literally three to five minutes. The next thing that you need is a Google account. So if you have a Gmail account or a Gmail email account, that's going to be great. We're going to be using Google docs for our ad creation and for our ad prompting. The third thing is we're going to be using Gigi to create our ad creatives and all of our ad messaging moving forward. And lastly, if you have not set up your mastermind business hub, pause the video, go and do that now. So if you've got those four things, let's go ahead and dive in.
